scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix frontend install --legacy-peer-deps && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix review-app install
scripts.ci:all: npm ci && npm --prefix frontend ci --legacy-peer-deps && npm --prefix backend ci && npm --prefix review-app ci
scripts.dev: npm run preflight && concurrently -n "frontend,backend" -c "green,blue" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:backend"
scripts.dev:review: npm run preflight && concurrently -n "review-app,backend" -c "magenta,blue" "npm run start:review-app" "npm run start:backend"
scripts.dev:all: npm run preflight && concurrently -n "frontend,review-app,backend" -c "green,magenta,blue" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:review-app" "npm run start:backend"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:review-app && npm run build:backend
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test
